reviews.review_description: It is fun and challenging but when I shoot the red wand it will kick me out so can you please fix it soon

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the honest replay! We will investigate the issue you reported. If you have more details about the issue please join our discord or contact us via mail.

reviews.review_description: Great sandbox game with a fun exploration element as you try to collect all artefacts to become the Master Builder. I have included it in my top 10 app lab list (https://youtu.be/8ZG7KHOOan8) and have one code to giveaway thanks to the generous devs.

Our whole family (including the kids) are having a blast with this game!! I have found the Hammer and the wand and almost built up to one of the clouds. Highly recommend playing the game and Luke I said, it is great for kids as well. The Dev team did a great job on this one!

reviews.review_title: A good game that will soon be GREAT
reviews.review_description: I recently did a Review of this game on my youtube if you want to check it out, just look for Papa Boney VR, the devs seem to be passionate about this project, it is already pretty good, and when they implement the updates they are talking about, I'm sure it will be even better!

An absolutely amazing pre-release, there are a few things missing at the moment, but this game is already such a great concept, and very original, and the future of this game is incredibly promising! It includes some highly interesting and original game mechanics, and I can't wait to see what happens with future updates!
You have to get this game if you love smashing blocks and destroying things! You can climb build and form new blocks it's awesome!!!

Only played for like 2 hours due to irl issues but it's a great experience! 
Looks very promising and I will update the review when I've got more time with it.
